$comment: Maps a Playwright screenshot name (from toHaveScreenshot('NAME.png')) to its doc image destinations under assets/img/. `npm run sync-docs` copies the standalone-light baseline to `light` and standalone-dark to `dark`. `dark` is OPTIONAL — omit it for shots the docs only use in light mode (most do). The MCP connect guides use these two images via {{< reuse-image src=... >}} (light only); the dark baselines are still captured + diffed for visual regression, just not published. Confirm paths before committing regenerated images.

ui-a2a-route.png.$note: NEW image. The new UI has no A2A playground, so this (and ui-a2a-listener) replace the old ui-a2a-skills/ui-a2a-success playground shots once agent/a2a.md's UI section is rewritten around the Traffic route view. Destination is provisional.
